allow: Bash(node -e "const f = require\('fs'\); const s = f.statSync\('data/kickstarter.db'\); console.log\('DB size:', Math.round\(s.size/1024/1024\) + 'MB'\);")

Bash(node -e "const db = require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('test.db'\); db.exec\('CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS t \(x TEXT\)'\); db.prepare\('INSERT INTO t VALUES \(?\)'\).run\('hello'\); const row = db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM t'\).get\(\); console.log\('better-sqlite3 works:', row.x\); db.close\(\); require\('fs'\).unlinkSync\('test.db'\);")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const buf=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/115416/Desktop/ks/src/app/categories/page.tsx'\); console.log\('first4:', buf.slice\(0,4\).toString\('hex'\)\); console.log\('size:', buf.length\); // Check for BOM or non-UTF8 var invalid=[]; for\(var i=0;i<buf.length;i++\){var b=buf[i];if\(b>0x7f\){if\(\(b&0xE0\)===0xC0\){if\(\(buf[i+1]&0xC0\)!==0x80\)invalid.push\(i\);}else if\(\(b&0xF0\)===0xE0\){if\(\(buf[i+1]&0xC0\)!==0x80||\(buf[i+2]&0xC0\)!==0x80\)invalid.push\(i\);}else if\(\(b&0xF0\)===0xF0\){if\(\(buf[i+1]&0xC0\)!==0x80||\(buf[i+2]&0xC0\)!==0x80||\(buf[i+3]&0xC0\)!==0x80\)invalid.push\(i\);} } } console.log\('invalid at:', invalid.slice\(0,10\)\);")
